plugin.short_description: Measure, learn, verify, and coordinate without rewriting your repo.
plugin.long_description: Four portable agent workflows from Recursive Harness: score predictions, turn corrections into reviewable improvements, inspect repository structure without executing project code, and coordinate concurrent local agents. The skills preserve existing AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, hooks, settings, and workflows; no automatic setup or remote service is included.

starter_prompts: Use Recursive Observe to record a falsifiable prediction for this task, then score it after verification.
Use Recursive Learn to capture this correction privately and prepare a reviewable improvement without changing the repository.
Use Recursive Verify to produce a structural scorecard for this repository without executing project code.
Use Recursive Coordinate to claim the shared scope and prepare a bounded local handoff.
limitations: This plugin is the portable skills suite, not the full Claude Code hook harness.
It does not install hooks, edit provider configuration, or merge with existing instruction files.
Verify inspects structure but does not execute project code or model-backed evals.
Coordinate is local-only and does not provide remote Agent Mail or distributed consensus.
Private sidecar data remains on the consumer environment until the user explicitly purges it.
The repository-wide MIT License is the software-use terms; the host platform's separate terms also apply.
